summary: The diff implements all five requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5) with high fidelity. AdBanner, InterstitialAd, and RewardedAd components are created; RootLayout is updated with top/bottom sticky banners; EndlessRunnerGame and HighwayRushGame integrate interstitial and rewarded ad systems; CSS placeholder utilities are added. One minor gap exists: the top banner in RootLayout is not confirmed to be sticky at the top of the viewport below the nav — the AdBanner component itself only has z-40 and width classes but no sticky/fixed positioning class in the visible snippet, while the nav bar is sticky at z-50.

missing_requirements.requirement: Top banner must be sticky at the top of the viewport (below nav), not just rendered below the nav in normal document flow.
missing_requirements.reason: The AdBanner component snippet only shows z-40, width, height, and border classes but no sticky or fixed position class. The RootLayout diff is truncated and does not confirm a sticky CSS position is applied to the top AdBanner instance.
